fields.name: userid
fields.comment: The player who this lesson is intended for

fields.name: hint_name
fields.comment: Name of the lesson to start.  Must match instructor_lesson.txt

fields.name: hint_target
fields.comment: entity id that the hint should display at. Leave empty if controller target

fields.name: userid
fields.comment: The player who this lesson is intended for

fields.name: hint_name
fields.comment: Name of the lesson to start.  Must match instructor_lesson.txt

events.name: instructor_server_hint_create
events.comment: create a hint using data supplied entirely by the server/map. Intended for hints to smooth playtests before content is ready to make the hint unneccessary. NOT INTENDED AS A SHIPPABLE CRUTCH

fields.name: userid
fields.comment: user ID of the player that triggered the hint

fields.name: hint_entindex
fields.comment: entity id of the env_instructor_hint that fired the event

fields.name: hint_name
fields.comment: what to name the hint. For referencing it again later (e.g. a kill command for the hint instead of a timeout)

fields.name: hint_replace_key
fields.comment: type name so that messages of the same type will replace each other

fields.name: hint_target
fields.comment: entity id that the hint should display at

fields.name: hint_timeout
fields.comment: how long in seconds until the hint automatically times out, 0 = never

fields.name: hint_icon_onscreen
fields.comment: the hint icon to use when the hint is onscreen. e.g. "icon_alert_red"

fields.name: hint_icon_offscreen
fields.comment: the hint icon to use when the hint is offscreen. e.g. "icon_alert"

fields.name: hint_activator_caption
fields.comment: the hint caption that only the activator sees e.g. "#YouPushedItGood"

fields.name: hint_color
fields.comment: the hint color in "r,g,b" format where each component is 0-255

fields.name: hint_icon_offset
fields.comment: how far on the z axis to offset the hint from entity origin

fields.name: hint_range
fields.comment: range before the hint is culled

fields.name: hint_binding
fields.comment: bindings to use when use_binding is the onscreen icon

fields.name: hint_allow_nodraw_target
fields.comment: if false, the hint will dissappear if the target entity is invisible

fields.name: hint_nooffscreen
fields.comment: if true, the hint will not show when outside the player view

fields.name: hint_forcecaption
fields.comment: if true, the hint caption will show even if the hint is occluded

fields.name: hint_local_player_only
fields.comment: if true, only the local player will see the hint

fields.name: hint_vr_panel_type
fields.comment: Attachment type for the Panorama panel

fields.name: hint_name
fields.comment: The hint to stop. Will stop ALL hints with this name

fields.name: hint_entindex
fields.comment: entity id of the env_instructor_hint that fired the event

fields.name: isbot
fields.comment: true if player is a bot
